---
title: "Monthly SET comfort breakdown"
description: "Stacked bar chart of occupied hours by Standard Effective Temperature (SET) comfort category across months."
categories: ["Timeseries data", "Simulation", "R"]
code-r: "https://github.com/CenterForTheBuiltEnvironment/chart-library/blob/main/src/R/plots/set-monthly.R"
code-python: None
code-contributor: "C. Nambiar, T. Kramer"
---

```{r set-monthly, fig.width = 10, fig.height = 5}
#| file: "../../src/R/plots/set-monthly.R"
#| code-fold: true
#| echo: true
#| eval: true
#| message: false
#| warning: false
#| out-width: 100%
#| fig-align: center
#| fig-dpi: 300
```

::: {.callout-note}
**Code:** [View R code on GitHub]({{< meta code-r >}})  ·  Added by {{< meta code-contributor >}}
:::
